title: Meet the 19-meter Cretaceous kraken that swam with mosasaurs
description: Layer by layer, researchers revealed the jaws of an ancient predator.

title: AI-Designed Drugs by a DeepMind Spinoff Are Headed to Human Trials
description: Isomorphic Labs president Max Jaderberg said at WIRED Health in London that the startup has built a “broad and exciting pipeline of new medicines.”

title: Report: Samsung execs worried company could lose money on smartphones for the first time
description: The AI-driven memory shortage is hitting Samsung's bottom line.

title: Marked-up Mac minis flood eBay amid shortages driven by AI
description: Apple’s sold-out Mac mini is spawning marked-up eBay listings as demand surges for the compact desktop, now favored for running local AI models and tools.

title: Man faces 5 years in prison for using AI to fake sighting of runaway wolf
description: Beloved wolf gripped the nation after burrowing out of the zoo.

description: Tim Cook was a great CEO, but he didn’t crack AI.  It’s job number 1 for John Ternus.

description: "Preliminary findings indicate that the issue likely results from a combination of factors."

title: Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga joins stacked StrictlyVC SF lineup for April 30 event
description: Surprise! StrictlyVC San Francisco, which will kick off this year’s events lineup for TechCrunch on April 30 at the Sentro Filipino Cultural Center, is getting a new addition to its increasingly stacked lineup of speakers. title: As electric aspirations fade, Porsche sells its stake in Bugatti
description: Porsche's stake in Bugatti and Rimac Group have been sold to private equity.

title: Nothing introduces an AI-powered dictation tool
description: Nothing's new on-device dictation tool supports over 100 languages.

title: DeepSeek previews new AI model that ‘closes the gap’ with frontier models
description: DeepSeek says both models are more efficient and performant than DeepSeek V3.2 due to architectural improvements, and have almost "closed the gap" with current leading models, both open and closed, on reasoning benchmarks.

title: The Download: supercharged scams and studying AI healthcare
description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. title: In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
description: Meta has commandeered a big chunk of Amazon's homegrown CPUs (not GPUs) for AI agentic workloads, signaling that a new kind of chip race has begun.

title: These AI Thirst Trap Creators Say They’re Misunderstood
description: A viral red carpet moment shone light on a group of hunky Instagram influencers—and the followers who are too horny to care that they’re not real.

title: Health-care AI is here. We don’t know if it actually helps patients.
description: I don’t need to tell you that AI is everywhere. Or that it is being used, increasingly, in hospitals. Doctors are using AI to help them with notetaking. title: 5 Reasons to Think Twice Before Using ChatGPT—or Any Chatbot—for Financial Advice
description: As people increasingly rely on AI chatbots for guidance, even on financial matters, a healthy dose of skepticism is critical.

title: Apple’s Next Chapter, SpaceX and Cursor Strike a Deal, and Palantir’s Controversial Manifesto
description: In this week’s episode of Uncanny Valley, we talk about Tim Cook’s legacy as CEO at Apple and what his long-rumored departure means for the future of one of the world's biggest companies.

title: The Download: introducing the Nature issue
description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Introducing: the Nature issue When we talk about “nature,” we usually mean something untouched by humans. But little of that world exists today.

title: Will fusion power get cheap? Don’t count on it.
description: Fusion power could provide a steady, zero-emissions source of electricity in the future—if companies can get plants built and running. description: What components are needed for building learning algorithms that leverage the structure and properties of graphs?

title: Distill Hiatus
description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

description: Reprogramming Neural CA to exhibit novel behaviour, using adversarial attacks.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
